texto: Do not manage as if you had ten thousand years before you. Look you death stands at your elbow make the most of your minute and be good for something while it is in your power.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Charles Palmer: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Do not manage as if you had ten thousand years before you. Look you death stands at your elbow ma…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, present, manage pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e reflexao.
